proof: function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Int](r.denom, Int.0)
function(x0: Int) { not x0.is_positive or Int.0 < x0 }(r.denom)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (not x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) = x0 > x1 }[Int](r.denom, Int.0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (not x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) = x1 < x0 }[Int](r.denom, Int.0)

goal: cross_equals(r.num, r.denom, s.num, s.denom) = (r.denom != Int.0 and s.denom != Int.0 and r.num * s.denom = s.num * r.denom)
proof: function(x0: Int, x1: Int, x2: Int, x3: Int) { (x0 != Int.0 and x1 != Int.0 and x2 * x1 = x3 * x0) = cross_equals(x2, x0, x3, x1) }(r.denom, s.denom, r.num, s.num)

goal: cross_equals(reduce(a, b).num, reduce(a, b).denom, a, b) or Int.0 = b
proof: function(x0: Int, x1: Int, x2: Int, x3: Int) { reduce(x0, x1) != reduce(x2, x3) or cross_equals(x0, x1, x2, x3) or Int.0 = x1 or Int.0 = x3 }(reduce(a, b).num, reduce(a, b).denom, a, b)
function(x0: Rat) { reduce(x0.num, x0.denom) = x0 }(reduce(a, b))

goal: cross_equals(reduce(a, b).num, reduce(a, b).denom, a, b)
cross_equals(reduce(r.num, r.denom).num, reduce(r.num, r.denom).denom, r.num, r.denom)

goal: reduce(a, b) = reduce(c, d) = (a * d = c * b)
